work.heading: London fashion editorials, beauty stories, and cinematic portrait work.

fineArt.heading: Fine-art portrait studies in beauty, fracture, and transformation.
fineArt.intro: Available as large-format, gallery-quality prints for private collectors, interiors, and curated spaces.
